imaging_summary: Pelvic MRI: 2.1 cm endometrial lesion with <50% myometrial invasion; no cervical stromal involvement; no suspicious pelvic or para-aortic lymph nodes. CT chest/abdomen/pelvis negative for metastatic disease.
pathology_summary: TAH-BSO with sentinel lymph node mapping: endometrioid adenocarcinoma, FIGO grade 1, invading 20% of myometrium, no lymphovascular space invasion. Bilateral sentinel nodes negative. Margins negative.
prior_treatment_history: Total hysterectomy with bilateral salpingo-oophorectomy and sentinel lymph node biopsy (staging surgery), completed 2 weeks ago
No prior systemic therapy or radiation
proposed_plan: Observation with routine surveillance; no adjuvant chemotherapy or radiotherapy.
patient_preferences: Prefers to avoid additional treatment if surveillance is appropriate; wants to understand her recurrence risk.
